rulings.Case Title: KENNETH THORNTON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 30, 2009, line 3, DEFENDANT D.W. NICHOLSON CORPORATION'S Motion To Strike Plaintiff's Complaint. Motion is denied. The false representation and punitive damages claims have been dismissed by plaintiff and are moot. Defendant fails to show how the strict liability claim is improper. (CCP section 437.) =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: GLORIA TRAN VS. BAYVIEW CAPITAL, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Gloria Tran'S Order To Show Cause Why A Preliminary Injunction Should Not Be Issued
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 30, 2009, line 18, Motion for preliminary injunction is denied. Plaintiff has not shown there is a likelihood that she will prevail on the merits. Insufficient showing that the harm plaintiff will suffer, if the injunction is not issued, will outweight the harm defendants will suffer, if the injunction is issued. =(302/CWW/xSK)
